name: Richard Norwood, PMP
title: Revenue Architect & Navigator
bio: Most consultants try to fix your Marketing — the paint job. I'm here to fix your Architecture — the engine. As a certified Project Management Professional, I merge the rigor of the PMBOK with the Revenue Journey Framework to guide agencies from fragmented, 'hero-led' operations to orchestrated, compounding growth. I install the Managed Nervous System that delivers Situation Awareness, deploys Information Fusion to automate perception, and proves the Unified Commercial Engine philosophy before a single line of sovereign infrastructure is written.
mission: Installing Unified Commercial Engines that transform digital presence from recurring overhead into high-value financial assets.
expertise: Commercial EKG Diagnostics (250+ point Revenue Journey Rubric)
